name: io.github.prolific-oss/prolific-mcp
description: MCP server bridging LLM agents to the Prolific public API

environment_variables.name: PROLIFIC_TOKEN
environment_variables.description: Prolific API token (create one at https://app.prolific.com)

environment_variables.name: PROLIFIC_URL
environment_variables.description: Override the Prolific API base URL
